title: Maker submits BUY, checker approves, dashboard reflects one approved trade

blackBoxPolicy.oracle: hard docs + KB/DB artifacts + workbook + observable browser behavior

steps.description: Login as maker using documented credentials.
steps.expectedOutput: Dashboard page loads and navbar shows admin (maker).

steps.description: Open Trading menu and navigate to New Trade.
Select BUY, Technology, AAPL, Cash, quantity 100, Day Order.
steps.expectedOutput: All required trade form fields are populated.
steps.actual: Trade form fields populated from test data.

steps.description: Wait for ticker price and total value to calculate.
steps.expectedOutput: Current Price is 178.50 and Total Value is 17850.00.
